meta.title: Ana Glam and Glow Makeup Artistry
meta.description: Bridal and editorial makeup artistry — soft, luminous looks for weddings, portraits, and special occasions.

slides.headline: Makeup that feels like
slides.lede: Soft, luminous, long-wearing makeup for weddings, portraits, and special occasions — tailored to your skin and your story.

slides.headline: Beyond beauty, a look that
slides.lede: Enhance your features and your confidence with makeup designed to photograph beautifully and last all day.

slides.headline: Radiant, authentic looks that feel
slides.lede: Years of dedicated experience crafting a natural glow that celebrates each individual's beauty.

about.heading: Hello, I'm Ana
paragraphs: I've spent the last several years helping brides, models, and everyday clients feel like the best version of themselves — one soft blend at a time. My approach favors skin that still looks like skin, colors that flatter rather than mask, and a finish that photographs beautifully and lasts all day.
Every face is different, so every appointment starts with a conversation: your skin type, the look you're picturing, and the moment you're getting ready for.

items.title: 100% Customized
items.description: Entirely tailored to you, ensuring a unique, personalized beauty experience.

items.title: Professional Artist
items.description: Expert skill from a trained artist, guaranteeing top-quality results.

items.title: Camera-Ready
items.description: Looks built to photograph beautifully in any light, from studio to golden hour.

items.title: 100% Reliable
items.description: Unwavering reliability in delivering consistent, on-time beauty services.

experience.heading: What to expect
experience.text: Experience a personalized touch from start to finish. Revel in a comfortable, unhurried session where your natural beauty is enhanced — ideal for any special occasion.

items.title: Bridal
items.description: Trial session plus wedding-day application, designed to hold through tears, dancing, and every photo.

items.title: Special Event
items.description: Formals, parties, photoshoots — a polished look tailored to the occasion and your outfit.

items.title: Editorial & Creative
items.description: Concept-driven makeup for shoots, lookbooks, and portfolios, built from a mood board or brief.

items.title: Bridal Party
items.description: Coordinated, camera-ready looks for bridesmaids and family, scheduled alongside the bride.

items.title: Makeup Lesson
items.description: A one-on-one session teaching your own routine — everyday, glam, or both.

items.title: Add-Ons
items.description: Lashes, airbrush finish, touch-up kits, and travel to your venue.

portfolio.heading: Portfolio
portfolio.note: Placeholder tiles — swap in your own photos.

items.quote: She listened to exactly what I wanted, and somehow made me look like the best version of myself. Everyone at the wedding asked who did my makeup.
My makeup lasted from the first photo at 8am through the last dance at midnight. I have never felt more confident in front of a camera.
Professional, warm, and incredibly talented. She made the whole bridal party feel relaxed and we all looked stunning.

items.title: Five products I use on every bride
items.excerpt: The skin-prep and long-wear staples in my kit that keep makeup fresh from first look to last dance.

items.title: How to prep your skin the week of your event
items.excerpt: A simple, gentle routine so your makeup applies smoother and photographs beautifully.

booking.heading: Let's find your date
booking.text: Appointments are booked through my online calendar — pick a time that works for you and I'll confirm within a day.

footer.locationBlurb: Bridal & editorial makeup artistry, based in Colorado Springs and available to travel.
